title: navarretia sinistra subsp. pinnatisecta
intro: Navarretia sinistra subsp. pinnatisecta is a plant species belonging to the phlox family and is native to California in the United States. It is also known as a type of avens or desert pinnate avens, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and skin irritations, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Navarretia sinistra subsp. pinnatisecta typically involve making a tea or infusion from the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, or applied topically to soothe skin irritations.
